title: mentha × rotundifolia f. ambigua
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. ambigua, also known as round-leaved pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural digestive aid, ease menstrual cramps, and repel insects. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia f. ambigua include its potential to reduce anxiety and improve respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Mentha × rotundifolia f. ambigua can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
